*Name:* Tarbat Discovery Centre
*Country:* scotland
*Region:* highlands
*County:* Highland
*Type:* abbey

*Coords:* 57.83695, -3.82746
*Wikipedia:* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portmahomack
*Maps:* https://www.google.com/maps/search/Tarbat%20Discovery%20Centre%20Highland%20scotland

*Has Wikipedia:* no
*Has Google Places:* unknown
*Enrich Notes:* remove wikipedia link, add source https://www.tarbat-discovery.co.uk/

*Description:*
Portmahomack is a small fishing village in Easter Ross, Scotland. It is situated in the Tarbat Peninsula in the parish of Tarbat.

_Listing 7 of 10_
